name: Stewed Cauliflower in Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------SAUCE---------------------------
2/3 cup stock
1 ts dry sherry
1/4 cup milk
Preparation: Wash cauliflower and cut florets into pieces about twice the size of strawberry mushrooms. Chop green onions into 1/4-inch pieces. Mix stock and sherry.
Cooking: Heat first oil to medium heat. Add garlic and stir for about 30 seconds, then remove before it begins to brown. Add cauliflower and stir-fry for about 1 minute. Stir in onion, salt, sugar; cook 30 seconds. Stir in Tientsin cabbage powder. If desired, add shrimp or crab meat.
Immediately add stock and sherry; bring sauce to a boil, stirring with cauliflower. Cover and simmer 4 minutes. Remove lid and thicken with cornstarch. Sauce should be very heavy so that when milk is added, it will thin slightly but still have body. Return sauce to a boil and slowly stir in milk. Add remaining peanut oil for a final glaze. Serve.
